name: Salmon-Wiches
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz can salmon, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
In a bowl, combine salmon, bread crumbs, eggs, dried thyme leaves, and celery salt. Shape into 6 patties and coat well with crushed crackers. In a skillet, sauté patties in hot oil; drain excess fat. Transfer to a Crock-Pot. Cover and cook on High for 2 to 3 hours. Butter English muffin halves. Place one patty on each half and top with Hollandaise sauce. Sprinkle with paprika.
